description: Armored infernal bruiser who turns takedowns into short windows of poise.

presentation.headline: Armored frontline hunter who builds momentum through decisive takedowns.
presentation.fantasy_hook: Soot-black plate, a chipped infernal shield, and a pact blade turn the shared hunter frame into a stubborn advancing wall.
presentation.identity_summary: The Ashen Knight trades speed and reach for dependable close-range pressure. Each kill reinforces a short window of poise, letting the knight hold ground while infernal weapons keep the lane burning.
presentation.passive_summary: Enemy kills briefly grant armor and damage, stacking up to three times while the knight keeps advancing.
tradeoffs: Needs takedowns to reach full poise
